testcase.name: test_market_study_electronics_china_spain

failure.message:
AssertionError: Market study failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration9_bug_fixes.py:192: in test_market_study_electronics_china_spain assert response.status_code == 200, f"Market study failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Market study failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
